name: Raidraptor - Blade Burner Falcon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ブレード・バーナー・ファルコン
desc:
2 Level 4 Winged Beast monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned, and your opponent's LP is at least 3000 higher than yours: You can make this card gain 3000 ATK. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can detach any number of materials from this card; destroy exactly that number of monsters your opponent controls.
